name: Ambilight
description: Transform your Jellyfin viewing experience with synchronized ambient lighting via WLED
overview: Automatic ambilight effects for movies and TV shows with real-time WLED control. This build adds WLED DNRGB realtime UDP support, fixes the DNRGB packet boundary gap with a 4 LED overlap, and improves playback progress handling after pause/resume.

versions.changelog: WLED DNRGB progress-fix build. Adds 4 LED DNRGB packet overlap, resume/start position sync, and safer playback progress seek detection to reduce drift after pause/unpause. Use WLED UDP realtime/notifier port 21324.
